title: Richard Korf
text: Home * People * Richard Korf Richard Korf [1] Richard Earl Korf , an American computer scientist and professor at the University of California, Los Angeles . He received his B.S. from MIT in 1977, and his M.S. and Ph.D. from Carnegie Mellon University in 1980 and 1983. His research is in the areas of problem-solving , heuristic search , and planning in artificial intelligence [2] . In particular, Richard Korf researched and published on best-first versus depth-first‎ search algorithms, and emphasized depth-first iterative deepening , as in IDA* versus A* .
